violations.text: The hot hold warmer in the kitchen is in poor repair. Hot hold warmer's thermometer needs to be repaired/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Chicken patties were observed @ 128 degrees in the hot hold warmer; chicken patties were reheated and moved to the steam table for service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The hot hold warmer in the kitchen is in poor repair and unable to maintain temperatures to keep product hot. Warmer will need to be repaired and taken out of service until it is fixed. PIC reheated chicken patties to 135 Fahrenheit degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
Observed missing floor tiles in the (kitchen) area near the refrigerator is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The double doors to the outside, located next to gym/cafeteria, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
